owner.name: Dana Wang
owner.title: Certified Professional Resume Writer (CPRW)
owner.niche_summary: Executive resume writing, LinkedIn optimization, ATS compliance, career coaching for senior professionals
owner.audience: VPs, Directors, C-suite leaders, Board members
owner.audience_examples: VP of Marketing, Director of Engineering, CFO, Board Director
owner.client_outcomes: Fortune 30 companies, high-growth startups, Board seats

pattern.label: Pattern
pattern.placeholder: Describe a pattern you keep seeing in your work or industry...

faq.label: FAQ
faq.placeholder: What question do you keep getting asked? What's your take?

noticed.label: Noticed
noticed.placeholder: What did you notice recently that others might have missed?

hottake.label: Hot Take
hottake.placeholder: What's your spicy opinion? Why do you believe it?

default_ctas.tips: Follow for more executive career strategy
default_ctas.beforeafter: Save this for your next resume update
default_ctas.mythreality: Follow for more myth-busting resume strategy

Monday.suggestion: Share a pattern or recurring mistake you see in your work

Tuesday.suggestion: Share a specific, actionable tip about resumes, LinkedIn, or job search

Wednesday.suggestion: Tell a story or go deeper on a topic with a client example

Thursday.suggestion: Share a contrarian opinion or professional stance

Friday.suggestion: Share a quick tip or insight that builds confidence

categories.leadership: Executive leadership, management strategy, C-suite perspectives
categories.careers: Career advice, job search strategy, professional development
categories.executive_careers: Senior-level and executive career content specifically
categories.hr_recruiting: Recruiting practices, hiring processes, what recruiters look for
categories.labor_data: Employment statistics, job market reports, economic indicators
categories.linkedin: LinkedIn platform updates, algorithm changes, feature releases
categories.hr_tech: ATS systems, recruiting technology, HR software trends
categories.compensation: Salary data, compensation trends, negotiation research
categories.workplace: Workplace culture, remote work, organizational trends
categories.business_news: General business news — only relevant when it signals hiring/career trends

scoring.scoring_description: Score articles for relevance to {owner.name}'s niche: {owner.niche_summary}. Target audience: {owner.audience}.
scoring.scoring_high: Directly relevant to {owner.niche_summary} or topics {owner.audience} would care about
scoring.scoring_low: Unrelated industry news, entry-level advice, or topics {owner.name} has no credible expertise to comment on
